title: MCS Arthropods
description: This datapack improves arthropods, makes them more interesting and adds new types of spiders!
body:
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.19.4+
* WIKI Version: 26.1v1
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
=== 
All commands available to the player starts with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_arthropods

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_arthropods

Mobs
===
- ⚠️ Arthropods are immune to fall damage.
- ⚠️ Arthropods take drowning damage in water.

Silverfish
-----
Basic information
- Drops: Iron Nugget (0-1)

Natural Spawning: 
* Overworld; Height: from -16 to 48; Spawn Chance: 10%
* Stronghold; Spawn Chance: 50%  

Endermite
-----
Basic information
- Drops: Chorus Fruit (0-1)

Aggressive Bee
-----
Basic information
- Health: 16 ❤️

Behavior:
* Attacks other mobs
* Regeneration
* Infinite stung
* Ignores entity, if it wears 1 peice of chainmail armor

Natural Spawning: 
* Overworld; replaces Spider with 5% chance, (0-5)

Cave Spider
-----
Natural Spawning: 
* Overworld; Height: from -32 to 32; Spawn Chance: 10%
* Mineshafts; Spawn Chance: 50%

[Spiders]
-----
* ⚠️ Spider has 5% chance to spawn as special.
* ⚠️ Spiders can hang upside down from the ceiling.

Cobweb Spider
-----
Basic information
- Armor: 12 🛡️
- Chance: 1.25% ☁️

Abilities
* Sets entities to the cobweb

Regen Spider
-----
Basic information
- Armor: 12 🛡️
- Chance: 1.25% ☁️

Abilities
* Provides regeneration and instant health effects within an 8 block radius to it allies
* Removes the regeneration effect from its target

Poisonous Spider
-----
Basic information
- Armor: 12 🛡️
- Chance: 1.25% ☁️

Abilities
* Summons area effect cloud of poison

Sneaky Spider
-----
Basic information
- Armor: 12 🛡️
- Chance: 1.25% ☁️

Abilities
* Becomes invisible

Arthropods size
-----
Those stats are applies to all arthropods expect bee, regular spider just has 4 more health!

Compatibility
===
* This datapack should be compatible with almost all other datapacks
* If you experience compatibility issues, feel free to contact me on Discord
